goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'leicester' and should 'arrive by 14:45'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'thursday'.
Make sure you get 'departure time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'swimmingpool'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from leicester and should arrive by 14:45
The train should go to cambridge and should leave on thursday
Make sure you get departure time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of swimmingpool
Make sure you get entrance fee
